home.title: Heritage Steel Buildings | Custom Metal Buildings
home.description: Custom steel buildings for commercial, agricultural, industrial, and residential projects. Design, engineering, fabrication, delivery, and installation.

about.title: About Heritage Steel Buildings | Steel Building Experts
about.description: Learn about Heritage Steel Buildings and our approach to steel building design, engineering, fabrication, delivery, and installation.

contact.title: Contact Heritage Steel Buildings | Request a Quote
contact.description: Contact Heritage Steel Buildings to discuss your commercial, agricultural, industrial, or residential steel building project and request a custom quote.

resources.title: Steel Building Resources | Heritage Steel Buildings
resources.description: Explore steel building resources, color options, planning information, and helpful downloads from Heritage Steel Buildings.

why-heritage.title: Why Choose Heritage Steel Buildings
why-heritage.description: Discover why customers choose Heritage Steel Buildings for personalized support, quality materials, engineering, fabrication, delivery, and installation.

building-types.title: Steel Building Types | Heritage Steel Buildings
building-types.description: Explore custom steel buildings for residential, commercial, agricultural, aviation, storage, and other specialized applications.

design-your-building.title: 3D Metal Building Designer | Heritage Steel Buildings
design-your-building.description: Design your custom metal building online. Explore building sizes, colors, roofing, doors, windows, and layouts with our interactive 3D building designer.

residential-buildings.title: Residential Steel Buildings | Heritage Steel Buildings
residential-buildings.description: Custom residential steel buildings for homes, garages, workshops, barndominiums, and storage. Designed for durability, flexibility, and long-term value.

commercial-buildings.title: Commercial Steel Buildings | Heritage Steel Buildings
commercial-buildings.description: Custom commercial steel buildings for offices, retail spaces, warehouses, churches, and more. Engineered around your business and building requirements.

agricultural-buildings.title: Agricultural Steel Buildings | Heritage Steel Buildings
agricultural-buildings.description: Durable agricultural steel buildings for barns, equipment storage, livestock facilities, workshops, and other farming and agricultural applications.

aircraft-hangars.title: Steel Aircraft Hangars | Heritage Steel Buildings
aircraft-hangars.description: Custom steel aircraft hangars engineered for private, commercial, and municipal aviation projects. Protect your aircraft with durable steel construction.

rv-boat-storage.title: RV and Boat Storage Buildings | Heritage Steel Buildings
rv-boat-storage.description: Custom steel RV and boat storage buildings designed to protect vehicles, watercraft, equipment, and recreational investments from the elements.
